key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to show/hide the dropdown

key.name: web-url
key.summary: URL to load in the dropdown window

key.name: window-width
key.summary: Window width as a fraction of screen width (0.0 - 1.0)

key.name: window-height
key.summary: Window height as a fraction of screen height (0.0 - 1.0)
